positive: A whimsical and energetic illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette under a vibrant, watercolor sunset sky. The mountains are rendered in deep indigo and burnt orange, contrasted against a gradient sky of peach and sky blue. Scattered among the peaks are abstract geometric woodland elements—stylized trees, wandering hot air balloons, and constellations—all outlined in clean black ink. The overall composition should be circular and highly centered, designed for perfect apparel placement. Minimalist line work meets vibrant, saturated color blocking, evoking feelings of adventure and dreamlike escape. High contrast, flat color application, perfect for screen printing, vector style, highly decorative, maximalist but clean.
